Title: Extends the amount of time for the board of regents to approve and issue a charter that has been resubmitted by a charter entity
Summary: Extends to ninety days the amount of time for the board of regents to approve and issue a charter that has been resubmitted by a charter entity.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to extending the amount of time for the board of regents to approve and issue a charter that has been resubmitted by a charter entity
